name: crowdstrike-mcp
description: Every CrowdStrike Falcon MSP operation, plus a Flight-Control-aware local store that answers fleet-wide questions across all your tenants at once — something no other Falcon tool (including the official MCP server) does.

crowdstrike_oauth_scope.title: CROWDSTRIKE_OAUTH_SCOPE
crowdstrike_oauth_scope.description: Sets CROWDSTRIKE_OAUTH_SCOPE for the CrowdStrike Falcon MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.

falcon_client_id.title: FALCON_CLIENT_ID
falcon_client_id.description: CrowdStrike API client ID (Falcon console > API Clients & Keys).

falcon_client_secret.title: FALCON_CLIENT_SECRET
falcon_client_secret.description: CrowdStrike API client secret. Shown once at client creation.
